title: IVA Music Academy ERP App
description: An ERP management app for IVA Music Academy — handling student enrollment, class scheduling, and operations — built solo with no-code tools in under a week.
longDescription:
Designed and built a complete ERP management application for IVA Music Academy using no-code development tools — without writing a single line of code.

The app handles the full operational workflow of the music academy including student enrollment and registration, class scheduling, instructor management, attendance tracking, and administrative operations. Built solo in under one week, this project demonstrates the ability to rapidly ship business-critical applications using design-first thinking and no-code platforms.
highlights: Full ERP system built solo in under one week
Zero lines of code — entirely no-code
